title_zh: 谷歌搜索提升你的旧货和复古购物的5种方式
title_en: 5 Ways Google Search Can Level Up Your Thrift and Vintage Shopping
summary_zh: 利用谷歌搜索和购物中的人工智能工具，轻松发现二手宝贝。
summary_en: Uncover second-hand treasures easily with AI tools embedded in Google Search and Shopping.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着人工智能工具的引入，谷歌搜索不仅帮助用户高效找到复古和二手物品，还优化了购物体验，节省时间和精力。

title_zh: 良好解释的定义及大型语言模型输出解释的挑战
title_en: A Definition of Good Explanations and the Challenges Explaining LLM Outputs
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于反事实解释概念的良好解释定义，强调在解释中必须考虑对话者对每个事实的先验信念。研究探讨了该定义对人工智能可解释性的影响，尤其说明了为什么大型语言模型的输出难以提供良好的解释。
summary_en: The paper proposes a definition of good explanations inspired by counterfactual explanations, highlighting the necessity to consider the interlocutor's prior beliefs for each fact in an explanation. It discusses implications for AI explainability and why it is challenging to produce good explanations for outputs from large language models (LLMs).
why_it_matters_zh: 解释性是推动人工智能广泛应用的关键，理解和定义良好解释有助于提升AI系统的透明度和信任度。本文的新定义和分析为解决大型语言模型输出的解释难题提供了理论基础。
why_it_matters_en: Explainability is crucial for the adoption of AI systems, and having a clear definition of good explanations enhances transparency and trust. The paper's new definition and analysis provide a theoretical foundation for addressing the challenges in explaining outputs from large language models.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A Definition of Good Explanations and the Challenges Explaining LLM Outputs. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Dr-DCI：通过动态工作区扩展实现直接语料库交互的规模化
title_en: Dr-DCI: Scaling Direct Corpus Interaction via Dynamic Workspace Expansion
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为DR-DCI的框架，通过将检索作为可调用动作，动态扩展局部工作区，从而实现对大规模语料库的直接交互。该方法结合了检索的广度召回和DCI的精准操作，有效提升了证据解决能力。实验表明，DR-DCI在多个数据集上均表现出色，不仅准确率显著提高，还减少了工具使用频率、运行时间和估计成本，同时在大规模语料库上保持稳定性。该方法优于传统的检索和训练搜索代理基线。
summary_en: This paper presents DR-DCI, a framework that treats retrieval as an agent-callable action to dynamically expand a local workspace for direct corpus interaction over large-scale datasets. By combining retriever-level recall with DCI-style precision, DR-DCI enhances evidence resolution capabilities. Experiments demonstrate superior accuracy, efficiency, and stability across scales, outperforming traditional retrieval and trained search-agent baselines on multiple benchmarks.
why_it_matters_zh: 传统检索接口仅能展示排名结果或受限的文档视图，限制了代理对材料的重组和跨文档验证能力。DR-DCI通过动态扩展局部工作区，实现了对语料库更灵活和精准的操作，解决了大规模语料库下纯命令交互效率低下、不稳定的问题。
why_it_matters_en: Conventional retrieval interfaces offer limited views, restricting agents' ability to reorganize and verify evidence across documents. DR-DCI overcomes inefficiencies and instability of full-corpus commands in large datasets by dynamically expanding a local workspace, enabling more flexible and precise corpus operations.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Dr-DCI: Scaling Direct Corpus Interaction via Dynamic Workspace Expansion. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: 该研究提出了关系结构因果模型，扩展了Pearl（2009）的结构因果模型，适用于对象及其关系变化的环境。论文展示了在没有额外假设的情况下，关于未见对象组合的因果和观察查询无法被识别。通过定义关系因果图并推导符号化识别准则，实现了在存在未观测混杂的情况下可识别。最后，提出了关系神经因果模型，在模拟的交通场景中表现优于非关系基线模型。
summary_en: This work develops relational structural causal models, extending Pearl's (2009) structural causal models to settings with varying objects and their relations. It shows that causal and observational queries about unseen combinations of objects are not identifiable without further assumptions. By defining relational causal graphs and symbolic identification criteria, it enables identification even with unobserved confounding. The proposed relational neural causal models outperform non-relational baselines on simulated traffic scenes with varying cars, signals, and pedestrians.
why_it_matters_zh: 因果模型对人工智能理解和推理至关重要。该工作突破传统结构因果模型的限制，使其适用于复杂多变的关系环境，提升模型在新组合上的泛化能力，特别是在交通等复杂场景中的应用潜力显著。
why_it_matters_en: Causal models are crucial for AI understanding and reasoning. This work extends traditional structural causal models to handle complex and varying relational settings, enhancing generalization to unseen object combinations and demonstrating superior performance in complex traffic scenarios, indicating promising applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Relational Structural Causal Models. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: PhoneHarness：通过混合GUI、CLI和工具操作驾驭手机使用代理
title_en: PhoneHarness: Harnessing Phone-Use Agents through Mixed GUI, CLI, and Tool Actions
summary_zh: 本文介绍了PhoneHarness，这是一个用于研究手机使用代理的混合操作基准和执行框架。它结合了GUI、命令行界面（CLI）和主机端工具操作，支持可验证的移动工作流执行。PhoneHarness不仅评估代理是否生成合理的最终答案，还验证任务完成后是否产生可观察的副作用。在评测中，PhoneHarness表现出75.0%的通过率，较其他非PhoneHarness方法高出12.9个百分点。
summary_en: This paper presents PhoneHarness, a mixed-action benchmark and execution harness designed to study phone-use agents over verifiable mobile workflows. It integrates GUI, command-line interface (CLI), and host-side tool actions, enabling executable mixed phone workflows and verifiable execution traces. PhoneHarness Bench evaluates whether agents complete tasks with observable side effects, not just plausible results. It achieves a 75.0% pass rate, outperforming the strongest non-PhoneHarness approaches by 12.9 percentage points.
why_it_matters_zh: 传统手机代理主要依赖于视觉GUI控制，难以验证操作结果是否真实发生。PhoneHarness通过混合操作路由和可审计执行，提升了自动化任务的可靠性和安全性，为手机代理研究提供了更全面的评估标准和执行环境。
why_it_matters_en: Conventional phone agents mostly rely on visual GUI control and struggle to verify whether intended outcomes actually occurred. PhoneHarness enhances reliability and safety in phone automation by routing mixed action surfaces and enabling auditable execution. This provides a comprehensive evaluation standard and execution environment for phone-use agents.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: PhoneHarness: Harnessing Phone-Use Agents through Mixed GUI, CLI, and Tool Actions. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 上下文压缩不是一件事：可读符号重表达与匹配预算下的连贯摘要
title_en: Context Compression Is Not One Thing: Readable Symbolic Re-expression vs. Coherent Summary at Matched Budget
summary_zh: 本文研究了小型语言模型在多跳问答中的上下文压缩问题。提出了一种名为Telegraph English的可读符号格式，将检索到的段落重写成结构化的实体关系陈述，以更低的令牌成本保留推理证据。在MuSiQue、TwoWiki和HotpotQA数据集上的控制实验中，Telegraph English在所有数据集中均超越了三种匹配预算的压缩基线（字符级删除、截断和随机子采样），F1得分提升13至20个百分点。它还优于同一编码器生成的连贯散文摘要，尤其在最难的数据集上表现突出。预先登记的深度交互假设未被支持：优势不会随着数据集内推理深度增加。结果表明，可读符号重表达比自然语言或连贯摘要在相同令牌预算下更密集地保留了实体内容。
summary_en: This study explores context compression for multi-hop question answering with small language models. It introduces Telegraph English, a readable symbolic format that rewrites retrieved passages into structured entity-relation statements, preserving reasoning evidence at a lower token cost. Controlled experiments on MuSiQue, TwoWiki, and HotpotQA show Telegraph English outperforms three matched-budget compression baselines (character-level deletion, truncation, and random sub-sampling) with gains of 13 to 20 F1 points, and also surpasses a coherent prose summary on the hardest dataset. A depth-interaction hypothesis was not supported, indicating the advantage does not increase with reasoning depth. These results suggest that readable symbolic re-expression preserves entity content more densely than natural language or coherent summarization at the same token budget.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究提出了新的符号格式，实验证明它在保持推理证据的同时，大幅提升了多跳问答的上下文压缩效果，挑战了传统连贯摘要的优势，具有推动小模型高效利用有限上下文的潜力。
why_it_matters_en: The study introduces a novel symbolic format that significantly improves context compression in multi-hop QA by preserving reasoning evidence effectively, outperforming traditional summarization methods. This highlights potential pathways for more efficient use of limited context in small language models.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Context Compression Is Not One Thing: Readable Symbolic Re-expression vs. Coherent Summary at Matched Budget. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 基于深度时序建模与集成融合的多模态生理信号情感识别
title_en: Deep Temporal Modeling and Ensemble Fusion for Multimodal Emotion Recognition from Physiological Signals
summary_zh: 本文针对健康监测和情感计算中的生理压力与情感识别问题，综合评估了长短期记忆（LSTM）、时序卷积网络（TCN）和Transformer三种深度学习模型在WESAD数据集上的表现，利用手腕和胸部传感器信号进行多模态情感识别。通过消融实验分析了单一模态（仅手腕或仅胸部）的贡献，实施了晚期融合集成策略结合三种架构的多模态预测，及早期融合将信号拼接输入单模型。结果显示，Transformer在多模态输入下准确率最高，TCN在手腕单模态下表现最佳，集成方法达成最高整体准确率98.91%及宏F1分数98.56%。研究体现了传感器融合和集成融合在构建鲁棒生理情感识别系统中的有效性。
summary_en: This work addresses physiological stress and emotion recognition for health monitoring and affective computing by evaluating deep learning models Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN), and Transformer on the WESAD dataset using wrist and chest sensor data for multimodal emotion recognition. Ablation studies assess each modality's individual contribution by training on wrist-only and chest-only signals. The study implements late-fusion ensemble combining predictions from all architectures trained on multimodal input and early fusion by concatenating signals before modeling. Results show Transformer excels in multimodal settings, TCN leads in wrist-only, and the ensemble achieves highest overall accuracy of 98.91% and macro-F1 score of 98.56%, demonstrating effectiveness of sensor and ensemble fusion for robust physiological emotion recognition systems.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究整合多种先进深度模型并结合早期和晚期融合策略，有效提升了生理信号情感识别的准确性，尤其是通过集成方法达到近99%的高性能，体现出多模态融合技术在情感计算领域的巨大潜力，推动健康监测技术发展。
why_it_matters_en: The study integrates advanced deep learning models with both early and late fusion strategies to significantly enhance accuracy in physiological emotion recognition, achieving near 99% performance via an ensemble approach. This highlights the strong potential of multimodal fusion techniques in affective computing, advancing health monitoring technologies.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Deep Temporal Modeling and Ensemble Fusion for Multimodal Emotion Recognition from Physiological Signals. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: olmo-eval：模型开发循环的评估工作平台
title_en: olmo-eval: An Evaluation Workbench for the Model Development Loop
summary_zh: olmo-eval 是一个设计用于支持模型开发循环的评估工具，旨在帮助研究人员和开发者更高效地评估和改进机器学习模型。
summary_en: olmo-eval is an evaluation workbench designed to support the model development loop, helping researchers and developers efficiently assess and improve machine learning models.
why_it_matters_zh: 在模型开发过程中，持续有效的评估是关键，olmo-eval 提供了一个集成化的平台简化这一过程，提高研发效率。
why_it_matters_en: Continuous and effective evaluation is essential in the model development process; olmo-eval offers an integrated platform that streamlines this process and boosts development efficiency.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: olmo-eval: An Evaluation Workbench for the Model Development Loop. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: PyTorch性能剖析（第二部分）：从nn.Linear到融合MLP
title_en: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
summary_zh: 本系列的第二部分介绍了如何使用PyTorch进行性能剖析，重点从简单的nn.Linear层到融合多层感知机（MLP）的优化过程。
summary_en: The second part of this series introduces how to perform performance profiling in PyTorch, focusing on the progression from a simple nn.Linear layer to an optimized fused multilayer perceptron (MLP).
why_it_matters_zh: 通过深入剖析PyTorch模型的各个组成部分，开发者可以更好地理解性能瓶颈，从而进行针对性的优化，提高模型运行效率。
why_it_matters_en: By profiling different components of PyTorch models in depth, developers can better understand performance bottlenecks, enabling targeted optimizations and improving model efficiency.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
